general.steam_controller_notice: External controller isn't detected? Try the steamdeck-input-disabler plugin from Decky.

encryption_error.title: Something went wrong
encryption_error.text: This video couldn't be decoded. Movies aren't supported in VacuumTube due to encryption. If this happens on other videos, try logging in or switching accounts.

generic.title: Settings
generic.description: Opens the VacuumTube settings overlay. You can access this overlay anywhere by pressing Ctrl+O on your keyboard, or R3 on your controller

adblock.title: Ad Block
adblock.description: Seamlessly blocks video and feed ads, not subject to YouTube's methods of preventing blockers

sponsorblock.title: SponsorBlock
sponsorblock.description: Skips sponsor segments in YouTube videos using a crowdsourced database. Currently only supports skipping sponsors

dearrow.title: DeArrow
dearrow.description: Replaces titles and thumbnails with more accurate, less sensationalized versions from a public crowdsourced database. Slows down loading, as it has to fetch info from the server

dislikes.title: Return Dislikes
dislikes.description: Uses community data from the Return YouTube Dislike API (returnyoutubedislike.com) to show rough dislike counts. Slows down video loading, as it has to fetch info from the server

remove_super_resolution.title: Remove Super Resolution
remove_super_resolution.description: Remove "Super resolution" (AI upscaled) qualities from low quality videos

hide_shorts.title: Hide Shorts
hide_shorts.description: Hides YouTube Shorts from the homepage

unlock_resolution.title: Unlock Resolution
unlock_resolution.description: Removes monitor resolution cap and allows you to watch videos at any resolution. Relaunch after toggling

h264ify.title: Filter Video Codecs
h264ify.description: Codec filtering options. Relaunch after toggling any of the options.
h264ify.enable_description: Enables the codec filter. This can help with performance and battery life on slower devices, but may reduce the available resolutions.

hardware_decoding.title: Hardware Decoding
hardware_decoding.description: Uses your GPU to decode videos when possible. Disabling this may fix playback issues, but can cause lag depending on your CPU. Relaunch after toggling

wayland_hdr.title: Wayland HDR
wayland_hdr.description: Enables HDR when using Wayland, but can cause desaturated colors on unsupported platforms. Relaunch after toggling

low_memory_mode.title: Low Memory Mode
low_memory_mode.description: Tells YouTube to enable low memory mode, which may improve performance on slower devices at the cost of some visual effects. Relaunch after toggling

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen
fullscreen.description: Enables fullscreen, and makes VacuumTube always launch in fullscreen

no_window_decorations.title: No Window Decorations
no_window_decorations.description: Disables window decorations, including the title bar and window border. Relaunch after toggling

keep_on_top.title: Keep on Top
keep_on_top.description: Enables Keep on Top, and makes VacuumTube launch with the window pinned on top of every other window

pause_on_blur.title: Pause on Blur
pause_on_blur.description: Pause current video when VacuumTube loses focus (e.g. tabbing out or minimizing the window)

features.title: Features
features.notice_title: Not part of the default experience
features.notice_description: These optional features extend VacuumTube beyond the standard TV YouTube experience. Enable them below to acknowledge that they rely on internal YouTube behavior and may change or stop working without notice.
features.enable_description: I understand that these features are outside VacuumTube's default experience and may change or break.
features.music_mode_description: Adds a No Video option to the quality selector for audio-only playback using YouTube's native music view.

userstyles.title: Custom CSS (Userstyles)
userstyles.description: Place .css files in the userstyles folder to customize the interface. Changes are applied automatically

touch_overlay.title: Touch Overlay
touch_overlay.description: Enables on-screen touch controls for easier navigation when touch input is detected

controller_support.title: Controller Support
controller_support.description: Enables support for game controllers, including navigation and video playback controls. Requires an external controller, such as an Xbox controller

device_discoverability.title: Device Discoverability
device_discoverability.description: Allows VacuumTube to be discovered by the YouTube mobile app on devices within the same local network. Relaunch after toggling

mac_permissions.title: Permissions
mac_permissions.description: Manage macOS permissions used by VacuumTube.
mac_permissions.microphone_description: Used only when you start YouTube voice search.
mac_permissions.restart_required: Changes made in macOS Settings require relaunching VacuumTube.
mac_permissions.request_granted: Microphone access is allowed. No permission prompt is needed.
mac_permissions.request_not_determined: macOS still has not shown a permission prompt. Use Reset Permission Prompt, then try again.
mac_permissions.request_denied_help: macOS will not show the permission prompt again while access is denied. Turn it on in macOS Settings, then relaunch VacuumTube.
mac_permissions.request_failed: VacuumTube could not request microphone access. Open macOS Settings and relaunch the app after changing access.
mac_permissions.resetting_microphone: Resetting the saved macOS microphone decision...

about.title: About
about.description: YouTube for TV on your desktop, with controller support and thoughtful enhancements.

updates.idle_detail: Check whether a newer version of VacuumTube is available.
updates.checking_detail: Looking for the newest VacuumTube release.
updates.current_detail: VacuumTube {version} is the newest version available.
updates.available_automatic_detail: Download the update now, then restart VacuumTube when it is ready.
updates.available_manual_detail: Download the latest build and replace your current copy.
updates.error_detail: Check your connection and try again, or open the releases page.
updates.development_detail: Automatic update checks are available in packaged builds.
updates.unsupported_detail: Use the update method shown below to check for a newer version.

setting.title: Donate
setting.description: Support VacuumTube's development by making a donation! You can donate by visiting shy.rocks/donate, or by pressing the button below to open the donation page in your browser
